creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
The problem is that the zfs.ko isn't loaded at boot time, even it is listed in loader.conf.

Doing a 
load /boot/kernel/kernel
load /boot/kernel/zfs.ko
boot

at the loader prompt the systems comes up, but the strange thing is, that no other kernel modules are loaded.

Any help on this topic is very appreciated.
